rationale: Gov't Code §2306.203 governs administration of the housing trust fund and has no operative connection to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict arises from increasing the exemption amount.
quote: The board shall adopt rules to administer the housing trust fund, including rules providing:
_note: Rule text concerns housing trust fund administration; no overlap with Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption.
